title: Challenges & Randomizer
description: Challenges, Randomizer and more! Change MC with small or complex modifications from fun to challenging. вҶ’ Part from MUtils
body:
# рҹ§© MChallenges MChallenges provides a variety of modifications (``challenges``) to change up your gameplay experience.
Challenges can make the game **harder**, more **interesting**, or just plain **silly**. Or everything at once! в–Ә Part from [**MUtils**](https://mutils.net)
в–Ә Works perfectly with [**MTimer**](https://modrinth.com/project/timer) to count your time & death punishments! This project started in 2021 and quickly evolved into us finding the limits of plugins with the curiosity how you can modify Minecraft to don't lose fun beating it. We hope you will have the same fun while playing like us! ### вҮ’ **Latest Update Trailer**
(Can contain features not available for everyone*)


# рҹҺҜ Challenges Each challenge can be toggled and configured individually inside the Challenge menu (``/challenge``).
All challenges can be combined and played in multiplayer or singleplayer (some require at least two players).
You have an idea for a new Challenge? We would be happy to hear it in our [discord](https://dc.mutils.net)! **в–Ә Current Challenge count** вҮ’ ``70`` | | |:-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | **Important**
*Some Challenges require MUtils Premium to keep all projects and needed servers alive :)
в–Ә Read more about it [here](https://mutils.net/premium). | To filter and search for Challenges, visit our own [Challenge List](https://mutils.net/ch/list) or use `ctrl` + `f`
Onestack (Stack limit) в–Ә You can only hold one item on each slot in your inventory! Can be modified up to 99 items --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Stack Limit` - Amount of items that can be hold in one slot рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge! ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/f69cb41ee20d2e8f194676793a00d0379db5c4ff.gif)
Health Drainer в–Ә Every few minutes your max health will be reduced by a given percentage. Better be quick! --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Percentage` - How much health is drained on each interval - `Interval` - Timing for each health draining рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
Vampire Challenge в–Ә Welcome to the world of darkness! Light will drain your blood. Kill mobs to gain their blood and sneak on killing to gather a blood pack (heal) --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Start Blood` - Keep it high when starting in day time - `Blood Capacity` - Maximal amount of blood that can be held - `HP - Blood` - Amount of blood that is drained from a mob per HP after death - `Blood Drain` - Blood drain amplifier that is multiplied with sun level рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/0121ca13ee7dd2c7e01dd094993dfb40076f1445.png)
Traffic Lights в–Ә You are trapped on the road. You are only allowed to move on green lights. If you move on red, you get punished --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Green Phase` - Green light timings - `Yellow Phase` - Yellow light timings - `Red Phase` - Red light timings - `Damage on red` - Punishment when moving over red! рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/a66a37db5e36f6c404276270036ab64b04ef9581.png)
Snake Path в–Ә Every player creates a path on walking. But be carefully! You are not allowed to touch it ever again... --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Visible Path` - You trail is visible for every player. Easier to avoid рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/465968950e3d7423ec4acaaf6b7ee636a8c6c768.gif)
Disable Features в–Ә Disable certain key features to challenge your self. Additionally a damage punishment can be added --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Block Category` - Disable specific block actions - `Interact Category` - Disable specific interaction actions - `Misc Category` - Disable actions that didn't fit into other categories - `Damage` - 0 = disable actions, 20 = instant kill рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus
Mob Hunt в–Ә Kill all Mobs in a given order to finish! Use /mobhunt to modify --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `No settings` рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Force` - You receive a task and are forced to finish it to proceed
Item Hunt в–Ә Collect all Items in a given order to finish! Use /itemhunt to modify --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `No settings` рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Force` - You receive a task and are forced to finish it to proceed
Mirror Challenge в–Ә Mirror certain things from you to all other players (sync) --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Sync Health` - `Sync Food` - `Sync Potions` - `Sync Hotbar` - This will not sync items, only the selected slot рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Multiplayer` - Needs 2 or more players. Perfect for a little party! ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/79cc241fa07aace921f14a8e05ea7ba89a1d1cb6.gif)
Chunk Flattener в–Ә Watch out your steps! Your current chunk slowly shrinks down --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Delay` - Time between each flattening рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/e8560bdfc91e807ba01c0faaa71d0bef90ca6e51.gif)
Chunk Breaker в–Ә Breaking a block will break all blocks of the same time in the chunk --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Bundle Drops` - All dropped item will be merged on the broken block to reduce lag рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/706b00587071c1a0ecbe604bfad46da63afa43f5.gif)
Chunk Decay в–Ә Your current chunk randomly decays till it's gone --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Delay` - Time between each decay - `Decay Percentage` - Amount of blocks that will randomly be removed from the chunk - `Drop Blocks` - All broken blocks will drop themself рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/7ebece5c72f6bc47b7b8e155976d0689c18d445e.gif)
Chunk Clearer в–Ә If you enter a chunk or touch a new block the whole chunk will be cleared --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Break All` - Completely clear the chunk instead only touched block type рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge!
Anvil Crusher в–Ә It's raining... Anvils? Watch out your steps, the sky tries to kill you --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Anvil Delay` - Base and modifier spawn timings - `Anvil Density` - Base and modifier spawn density - `Anvil Radius` - Anvil spawn radius - `Anvil Height` - Anvil spawn height рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/b5cffbdd45163c00ccd9c6285838441b85c4aa11.gif)
Item Decay в–Ә Act fast! All your items have a limited lifespan till they disappear --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Decay Time` - Time till item will disappear рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge! ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/302724789135d5374cb8eff5ecd5281a5e6a2376.gif)
Area Timer в–Ә Chosen areas like biomes, chunks, worlds or even heights can only be visited a limited time. Play fast! --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Max Time` - Maximal allowed time in each area - `Count Global` - Maximal time will count for all players - `Area Mode` - Define the area, which will be limited рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
Damage Multiplier в–Ә Higher or lower all damage against players. Includes potion debuffs and fire --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Multiplier` - Damage = original damage * multiplier рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
F.L.Y. Challenge в–Ә Fly with a new power through the sky like a hero! Sneak in midair to activate --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Power` - Flying boost and speed. More speed results in more damage on impact рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/3eba96c2fe88c72c7f3e5b95016e1ce9b30846d2.gif)
Gravity Switch в–Ә The world gone crazy and every few seconds the gravity switches between 4 new gravities --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Delay` - Time of no custom gravity between swaps рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
Border в–Ә A border will be created around you which will grow with depending on your mode. Can you handle the limited space? --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Border Radius` - Radius settings for the border - `Border Mode` - When should the border grow рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable - `Force` - You receive a task and are forced to finish it to proceed
*Currently requires full access*
MLG Challenge в–Ә Once a while you are forced to perform a random MLG! Can you survive the fall? --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Delay` - Minimum and maximum duration between MLGs - `Height` - Minimum and maximum height in blocks to perform the MLG - `Hard MLGs` - Activate to perform the hardest MLGs. Only for skilled players! рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge! ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/a8459259ae87fe5386a7206fa665784030a2ec98.gif)
*Currently requires full access*
Death Hunt в–Ә Die to all given deaths in a specific order to finish! Use /deathhunt to modify --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `No settings` рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Force` - You receive a task and are forced to finish it to proceed
*Currently requires full access*
Rhythm Craft в–Ә Turn Minecraft into a full Rhythmgame! Every action needs to be done on the beat to follow the world rhythm. --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `No settings` рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge! - `Beta` - Not finished yet. Lacks content and/or contains bugs
*Currently requires full access*
Game Speed Shuffler в–Ә The game will constantly change the speed which effects every action. Can you keep up? --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Tick Speed` - The range in with the tick speed can change - `Shuffel Rate` - Timings between each tick shuffling рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable - `Beta` - Not finished yet. Lacks content and/or contains bugs
*Currently requires full access*
Damage Order в–Ә Only one player at a time is allowed to damage mobs. But this player changes on every hit! --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Damage On Wrong` - Amount of damage a player receives when ignoring the order - `Random Order` - No set order. Each time a random player is chosen - `Info Bar` - Display the player in current order рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
*Currently requires full access*
World Decay в–Ә The world around you disappear step by step! Remember your surrounding to keep alive (only visual - needs MWeb) --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Step Delay` - Time between each reduction from visible blocks - `Steps To 100%` - Amount of reductions until the full world is invisible рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge!
*Currently requires full access*
Chunk Mirror в–Ә Every interaction like building is mirrored in all other chunks! What can you create? --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Environment Mirror` - Also mirror block updates not triggered by players рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus
*Currently requires full access*
Low Vision в–Ә The whole world is invisible except the blocks you choose! Every player can choose their own blocks --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Block Amount` - Amount of visible blocks players can choose on start рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge!
*Currently requires full access*
Collect Battle в–Ә Compete against all other players in this round based game! First, you gather an item as fast as possible. In the second phase, a random other player needs to gather the same item faster! You can still beat the game? --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Max Set-Time` - Maximal time players can register a new item - `Time Between Rounds` - Items acquired in this state can not be registered - `Extra Time` - Time that will be added to each registration time to prevent instant locking рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Force` - You receive a task and are forced to finish it to proceed ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/30ae375024f29f65e1279534d4c7c93f4ef83257.png)
*Currently requires full access*
InTime Challenge в–Ә Every Entity has a limited time to live. You too! Kill mobs to steal their time --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Player Time` - Player starting time - `Entity Time` - Entity starting time - `Time per HP` - Reduced time by each hp damage a player receives from a mob рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/5f51770bd5fb89c82c625db82f4633007f402f59.gif)
*Currently requires full access*
Mob Blocks Randomizer в–Ә Every block contains a random mob. Break the block to release it and only after killing it, the item drops --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Random` - Enabled: Each action is random, Disabled: Same block = same mob рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Randomizer` - Parts of Minecraft are randomized and change each play through ![Challenge Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5fu9B7as/images/3f5ac2ec05e59352119149ebbd9d9cf0b8b6a666.gif)
*Currently requires full access*
Rewind Challenge в–Ә Create Checkpoints (F) to travel back in time! But be warned... Time traveling is dangerous --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Only Position` - Will not affect the world рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus
*Currently requires full access*
Dimension Swap Challenge в–Ә All portals are shuffled! Now you have to fight the Ender Dragon in... the Overworld? Nether -> End -> Overworld --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Starter Pickaxe` - Each player starts with an unbreakable wooden pickaxe рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
*Currently requires full access*
Snake Challenges в–Ә You can only move on your personal snake, which permanently move in your viewing direction --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Speed` - Snake movement speed рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge!
*Currently requires full access*
Realistic Minecraft в–Ә Is MC to unrealistic? This Challenge will change everything to discover a full new Minecraft --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `No settings` рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge!
*Currently requires full access*
Ghost Challenge в–Ә Discover the depths with your new ability to travel through blocks! But be aware... Ghosts are weak --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Radius` - Ghost vision radius - `Adventure Ghost` - Can't break blocks in ghost mode - `Ghost Glide` - Glide through ghost blocks instead of only falling рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus
*Currently requires full access*
Block Async Challenge в–Ә Every player sees his own world! But should a player interact with a block modified by a different player he dies. Communication is key --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Hide Players` - Add more difficulty by completely hiding other players рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Multiplayer` - Needs 2 or more players. Perfect for a little party!
*Currently requires full access*
No Same Items в–Ә If you collect a item, wich was already collected, you loose one heart --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Lives` - Total lives. You loose one for each same item - `Lives = HP` - Sync the challenge lives to your health lives - `Announce Mode` - Receive notifications about all new items, only live updates or nothing at all рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable - `Multiplayer` - Needs 2 or more players. Perfect for a little party!
*Currently requires full access*
Limited Skills в–Ә Only one player can see mobs but can't damage them. The other can't see mobs but can deal damage --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Random Roles` рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge! - `Multiplayer` - Needs 2 or more players. Perfect for a little party!
*Currently requires full access*
Run Randomizer в–Ә The only way to gather items is running! Every X-Blocks you get a random stack of items --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Block Goal` - The amount of blocks needed for a new item рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Randomizer` - Parts of Minecraft are randomized and change each play through
*Currently requires full access*
Damage Duell в–Ә If you deal damage, all other players also get damaged by a percentage --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Percentage` - The percentage of damage that will be reflected рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Multiplayer` - Needs 2 or more players. Perfect for a little party!
*Currently requires full access*
One Biome World в–Ә The whole world contains only one biome. The biome switches every X seconds --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Delay` - The time between each world swap рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
*Currently requires full access*
Boost'em UP в–Ә Every entity/mob in your range will be boosted in the sky --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Effect Radius` - `Boost Power` - Mobs will fly higher on higher power - `Only Mobs` - Does not affect entities like items, boats, ... рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
*Currently requires full access*
Only Right Tools в–Ә You can only break blocks with the correct tool --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Starter Axe` - Start with a wooden axe to skip traveling for structures рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
*Currently requires full access*
Sneak Spawner в–Ә Be prepared... Every sneak will spawn a random mob on your position --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Only Mobs` - Does not spawn non living entities like boats рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Randomizer` - Parts of Minecraft are randomized and change each play through
*Currently requires full access*
Stay Awaay в–Ә Getting to close to other mobs or players causes damage. Time for some social distancing --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Damage Distance` - Radius of blocks that you need to stay away рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge!
*Currently requires full access*
Block Randomizer в–Ә Block drops are shuffled (or random) --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Full Random` - Enabled: Each action is random, Disabled: Same block = same item рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Randomizer` - Parts of Minecraft are randomized and change each play through
*Currently requires full access*
Mob Drop Randomizer в–Ә Mob drops are shuffled (or random) --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Full Random` - Enabled: Each action is random, Disabled: Same mob = same drop - `Item Mode` - Activate to randomize all items except only mob drops рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Randomizer` - Parts of Minecraft are randomized and change each play through
*Currently requires full access*
Biome Randomizer в–Ә World biomes are shuffled (or random) --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Full Random` - Enabled: Each action is random, Disabled: Same biome = same shuffled biome рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Randomizer` - Parts of Minecraft are randomized and change each play through
*Currently requires full access*
Mob Randomizer в–Ә Mob spawning is shuffled (or random) --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Full Random` - Enabled: Each action is random, Disabled: Same mob = same shuffled mob рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Randomizer` - Parts of Minecraft are randomized and change each play through
*Currently requires full access*
Damage Randomizer в–Ә Damage is shuffled like 2hp will be always 5hp (or random) --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Full Random` - Enabled: Each action is random, Disabled: Same damage = same shuffled damage рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable - `Randomizer` - Parts of Minecraft are randomized and change each play through
*Currently requires full access*
Loot Randomizer в–Ә Randomize all items in chest containers! --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Random Enchants` - Items can be randomly enchanted рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable - `Randomizer` - Parts of Minecraft are randomized and change each play through
*Currently requires full access*
Force Collect в–Ә You are forced to collect the prompted item to survive --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Timings` - Time that will be randomly chosen for collecting time and grace time - `Goals` - All goals that will randomly be prompted to find/collect рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable - `Force` - You receive a task and are forced to finish it to proceed
*Currently requires full access*
No Double Kills в–Ә You are not allowed to kill the same mob twice in a row --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Count Global` - Last killed mob will be synced for each player рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
*Currently requires full access*
Damager Challenge в–Ә You will be confronted with constantly damage from the chosen event. Can you survive? --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Damage Event` - The event for receiving damage - `Damage` - Amount of damage - `Interval` - Time between each damage tick (Only affecting type INTERVAL) рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge!
*Currently requires full access*
Collection Rivals в–Ә Collect/find/kill the prompted goal to get the next. Player with the most points win --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Search Type` - All tasks that will randomly be prompted to find/collect - `Joker` - Amount of joker to skip a task рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus - `Force` - You receive a task and are forced to finish it to proceed - `Multiplayer` - Needs 2 or more players. Perfect for a little party!
*Currently requires full access*
Rocket Mode в–Ә Sneak to fly up. But be aware! Flying with a rocket is hard... And hold an eye on your heat --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Fuel Capacity` - Amount of fuel before exploding рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
*Currently requires full access*
Block World в–Ә All chunks are built from one block type! Step through a new cursed world --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `No settings` рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Fun` - Easy Challenge with fun in focus
*Currently requires full access*
Minefield World в–Ә The whole world is covered with dangerous mines. Don't step on them! --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Density` - Amount of generated mines рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Hard` - Good for everyone searching a Challenge!
*Currently requires full access*
Block Wall в–Ә You are hunted by a wall! Watch out your steps, breaking the wall is impossible --- вҡҷпёҸ **Settings** - `Wall Material` - This block will become unbreakable. Do not use tile blocks - `Spawn Delay` - Time until the wall catch up рҹҸ·пёҸ **Tags** - `Medium` - Slightly more difficult than normal Minecraft but still very doable
*Currently requires full access*



## рҹ’Һ Utilities & Commands To fully enjoy all new content, we also added some neat extras that can be disabled if unwanted. в–Ә First column indicates if the command is usable without OP.
в–Ә To see more about permissions look inside our [documentation](https://mutils.net/ch/info)! | | **в–ҫCommandв–ҫ** | **в–ҫDescriptionв–ҫ** | |:--:|:-------------------------------|:-------------------------------------------------------------:| | вқҢ | `/challenge [<...>]` | Main Command to access Challenges & settings | | вқҢ | `/rule ` | Activate / change custom game rules like pvp | | вң” | `/backpack [, setup]` | Access or setup a personal or global backpack | | вқҢ | `/heal []` | Restore health & saturation for yourself or targets | | вқҢ | `/hide []` `/show` | Fully hide yourself or targets from all other players | | вқҢ | `/invsee ` | See & modify the inventory from other players | | вң” | `/position ` | Save your current position to find it later again | | вқҢ | `/reset []` | Delete current world and generate a new one (restarts server) |


## рҹ”Ң API & Challenge Addons MChallenge provides a feature rich environment for Challenges with GUI's, settings menus and saving and more. You can add your own Challenges to the Addon Category in a few seconds! в–Ә [Challenge addon template](https://github.com/MUtils-MC/MChallenge-Addon)
в–Ә If you want to publish your addon, please notify me on Discord, so I can add it to our [list](https://mutils.net/ch/addons) :) If you want to inject into the Challenge lifecycle or even manipulate it with your own plugin, you can access the [**API**](https://github.com/MUtils-MC/MChallenge-API): ```kts dependencies { compileOnly("de.miraculixx:challenge-api:1.5.0") } ``` NOTE: The Challenge flow and registration are very strict and carefully crafted to allow this amount of content without a performance impact. Challenge code and data only load when the challenge starts and is unloaded after stopping. The project is open source :)
If you want to take a look and maybe even find improvements, we would be happy to hear back!
